phrases.text_local: Onde fica o café no terraço superior?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW kuh-FEH NOO teh-RAH-soo soo-peh-REEOHR?

likely_response.local: O café no terraço superior está localizado no Miradouro Superior.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW kuh-FEH NOO teh-RAH-soo soo-peh-REEOHR ehs-TAH loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-doo NOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo soo-peh-REEOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: The café on the upper terrace is located at the Upper Viewpoint.

responses.english: The café on the upper terrace is located at the Upper Viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: AW kuh-FEH NOO teh-RAH-soo soo-peh-REEOHR ehs-TAH loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-doo NOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo soo-peh-REEOHR.
responses.french: O café no terraço superior está localizado no Miradouro Superior.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find Five Senses fountains
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as fontes dos Cinco Sentidos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH FOHNG-tihsh DOOSH SEEN-koo sayng-TEE-doosh?
phrases.cultural_note: The fountains mark the start of the historic zigzag stairway, symbolizing sight, smell, taste, touch, and hearing.

likely_response.local: As fontes dos Cinco Sentidos localizam-se no Escadório do Bom Jesus.
likely_response.pronunciation: UHSH FOHNG-tihsh DOOSH SEEN-koo sayng-TEE-doosh loo-kuh-LEE-zuhng-SIH NOO shkuh-DAWR-yoo DOO BOHNG zhih-ZOOSH.
likely_response.translation_en: The Five Senses fountains are located on the Stairway of Bom Jesus.

responses.english: The Five Senses fountains are located on the Stairway of Bom Jesus.
responses.phonetic: UHSH FOHNG-tihsh DOOSH SEEN-koo sayng-TEE-doosh loo-kuh-LEE-zuhng-SIH NOO shkuh-DAWR-yoo DOO BOHNG zhih-ZOOSH.
responses.french: As fontes dos Cinco Sentidos localizam-se no Escadório do Bom Jesus.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar um café ou lanche no Bom Jesus do Monte?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OONNG kuh-FEH OHW LAHNNG-shih NOO BOHNG zhih-ZOOSH DOO MOHNG-tih?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao funcionário do café no terraço superior.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DOO kuh-FEH NOO teh-RAH-soo soo-peh-REEOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the café staff on the upper terrace.

responses.english: Ask the café staff on the upper terrace.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DOO kuh-FEH NOO teh-RAH-soo soo-peh-REEOHR.
responses.french: Pergunte ao funcionário do café no terraço superior.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find Five Senses fountains
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as Fontes dos Cinco Sentidos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH FOHNG-tihsh DOOSH SEEN-koo sayng-TEE-doosh?
phrases.cultural_note: As Fontes dos Cinco Sentidos estão localizadas ao longo do Escadório do Bom Jesus, cada uma representando um dos sentidos.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, they are on the stairway.

responses.english: Good morning, they are on the stairway.
